title: CCMB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 28 Technician, Driver Posts
description: The Centre for Cellular and Molecular Biology (CCMB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 28 Technical Officers, Technicians, and Driver Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 10th, ITI, and M.Sc. can apply for the CCMB Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age ...
